questions.question: Decomposition of H2O2 → H2O + O2 is a ______ reaction.

options.A: Combination
options.B: Disproportionation
options.C: Displacement

questions.question: Cell Constant (G*) is equal to the ratio ______.

options.A: l/A
options.B: A/l
options.C: κ/R

questions.question: During discharging of Lead-storage battery, PbSO4 is formed and conc. of H2SO4 ______.

options.A: Increases
options.B: Decreases
options.C: No change

questions.question: The variation of Λm with √c for weak electrolytes (like CH3COOH) follows ______.

options.A: Straight line
options.B: Parabola/Hyperbola-like curve
options.C: Constant line

questions.question: Which is strongest oxidising agent?

options.A: F2
options.B: Cl2
options.C: Br2

questions.question: Strictly synthesize the correct statement regarding Electrochemistry Redox: According to Kohlrausch's law of independent migration of ions, the limiting molar conductivity of an electrolyte is equal to: [Variant 2-4]

options.A: The sum of the individual contributions of the anion and cation of the electrolyte
options.B: The product of the specific conductivities
options.C: The difference between cation and anion mobilities
